descriptionInUI: Runtime for the COIN insurgency layer's moving objects. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.coin (a COIN campaign with a live HVT convoy and/or a mobile VBIED this turn). Movement ONLY -- the consequence (kill the HVT before the strike window closes = a decapitation; intercept the VBIED before it reaches a friendly base = defused; let either live = it resolves against your political mandate) stays in the campaign's turn logic, so a mover you shoot down is recorded natively like any other unit. HVT: the named leader's convoy drives a slow, random patrol around its area (alarm-green, so it relocates rather than stopping to fight) -- you have to find and run it down, not bomb a parked jeep. VBIED: the suicide vehicle bomb drives for the nearest friendly base; kill it en route or it detonates on arrival. Both begin after a short startup grace so nothing lurches the instant the mission loads. All movement is off-road at low ground speed.

specificOptions.nameInUI: HVT: seconds between patrol legs (re-rolls a new destination)
HVT: patrol radius around his area (m)
VBIED: seconds between re-issuing the drive order (anti-stall)
